entry.title: Re: To trigger BAdI logic when only click 'Save' button i...
entry.content:
Hello, 

Based on my understanding, 

I think you can achieve this by setting a condition in the implementation of the BAdI MM_PUR_S4_PO_MODIFY_ITEM. You can check the action being performed by the user and trigger the logic only when the action is "Save".

You can use the parameter ACTION in the method MODIFY_PO_ITEM of the BAdI to check the action being performed. If the action is "Save", then you can execute your custom logic.

Here is an example:

DATA: lv_action TYPE char20.

lv_action = io_data->get_action( ).

IF lv_action = 'SAVE'.
" Trigger your custom logic here
ENDIF.

By checking the value of the parameter ACTION, you can ensure that your custom logic is only triggered when the user clicks the Save button in the Purchase Order.

Let me know if this works.

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: SIGNAVIO Feature Request:Possibility to create a new...
entry.content:
Hi Tiago,

Thanks for using our product and providing a feedback!

I have shared it with the product team as a feature request. Hopefully, it can soon be available for documentations. However, what is available at the moment is that you can download the existing/created document in an Excel template.

Kind regards,
Taleh

entry.title: connection between sap btp and a s/4 hana cloud private system
entry.content:
Hello to everyone,
I have been reading this course: https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/extending-sap-s-4hana-with-sap-build-apps-and-key-user-extensibility/establishing-connectivity-between-sap-s-4hana-cloud-and-sap-btp_f3d6df41-c36c-450b-8ae8-79534e043fa1 . 

and many doubts arose.
The first one is: Do I have to have the Communication Systems application implemented, in order to make the connection between BTP and my S/4 HANA system?
the second doubt is: Can it be that to connect BTP with S/4 HANA Cloud Private and S/4 HANA on-premise I have to use Cloud Connector, but for S/4 HANA Cloud Public I don't have to use it?

Help please, I am lost with this.
Thanks and greetings to all,

entry.title: Default layouts
entry.content:
Hi collogues.

I just made some changes on the layouts of vendor/customer reports, but unfortunately, I tried many ways to get the original layout format with showing name/city for each schedule but with no luck.

Is there any other way to get the layouts into original format or reset the SAP settings.

Thank you all.

M.Hassan

entry.title: Re: Default layouts
entry.content:
Hi ,

i'm also facing same issue. Is there any process to restore the original or default layout formats?

entry.title: Re: BTP CI-Filter condtion set up on oDATA API ( API_SALE...
entry.content:
Hi Ryan,
Great. my first query is running with this filter
$filter=(CreatedByUser eq 'RFC_BTP_DEV' and (CreationDate ge datetime'2024-06-10T00:00:00'))

But my final query should be like mentioned in my first question, how to be it look like?
$filter=(CreatedByUser eq 'RFC_BTP_DEV' and (CreationDate ge datetime'${date:now:yyyy-MM-dd'T'00:00:00}'))- ${property.p_daysInPast}' and CreationDate le datetime'${date:now:yyyy-MM-dd'T'00:00:00}')

note: ${property.p_daysInPast} value should be in days ( ex: 3 or 5..)

Could you please also suggest how it would be like?

Thank you 

Sateesh

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Capacity checking control at sales order and Sales Quotation Level
entry.content:

Thanks

 

LP

entry.title: Old Instances Persisting in SAP Build Process Visibility Scenario After Redeployment
entry.content:
Hello,

Recently, I encountered a backend issue in my workflow within SAP Build Process Automation, which caused many instances to crash. After resolving the problem and redeploying the process, the old instances are still visible in the process visibility scenario, rendering it ineffective.

I've tried several solutions, including:

  • Deleting all "older" released versions of the process
  • Redeploying the process visibility scenario
  • Clearing the processed data in the monitoring settings of the SAP Build lobby

Despite these efforts, the old instances always reappear after processing new data. They are no longer visible in the monitoring of the process/workflow itself, yet they persist in the visibility scenario.

Does anyone have any hints on how to fix this?

Thank you!

entry.title: Does Sap data intelligence has count_distinct function
entry.content:
How can we implement count_distinct function in SAP data intelligence , as there is no direct function available like in SAP BODS.

Thanks

entry.title: Mass filtering in SAP Signavio?
entry.content:
Hi,

is there a way that I can include 50 order numbers at once in the filtering in SAP Signavio? I have a case where we have 50 to 100 sales orders in an S4 app that are delivered too late. I would like to view them all together in Signavio and analyze common problems.
I have them as a list. Is there a way to filter them all together in one go in Signavio? or do I have to enter them all manually one by one.

Greetings Niels

entry.title: Call for Lectures meccanica feminale 2025
entry.content:
Winter School - Submit your proposal now!

The University of Stuttgart looking for female lecturers for courses:

AI, industry 4.0, XR, CAD, Python and other programming languages, app development, renewable energy, energy management & energy storage, environmental engineering, autonomous driving & electromobility, material science, construction methodology, requirements engineering, simulation & modelling, measurement & systems technology, control procedures, bionic & biomedicine, signal processing, information & communication technologies, aerospace technology, mechatronics, ...

and lecturers for social skill courses:

knowledge and time management, self-confident appearance, voice training, mentoring, career planning, technical English, conflict management, work life balance, reconciling family and career, ...

Submissions are possible until 16/06/2024.

Call for Lectures - Scientifica

entry.title: Re: Questions re: "Multi-model with SAP HANA Cloud" developer challenge
entry.content: Use the password that you set in Step-8

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Platform Transport Management service generally available
entry.content:
Hello,

technically the TMS instance can run in any subaccount. So you could run it for example in your QUA environment.

As a best practice we recommend to set up a separate 'administrative' subaccount in which you can run services like cTMS which (normally) only exist once in your landscape. This makes user management potentially easier, because you could give access to this subaccount only to people with administrative tasks in cTMS (or other services running there). 

Business users who have access to QUA for testing would not even see the administrative subaccount or the cTMS instance.

If, however, you have a strong overlap between people doing testing in QUA and people managing transports it is totally ok to put cTMS into the QUA subaccount.

Please also check the BTP best practices guide on SAP Help: https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/best-practices/considerations-for-account-model-setup?version=Cloud

Kind regards
Harald

entry.title: Call Service before fetching metadata in Fiori Elements ListReport page
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a requirement that I need to call SuccessFactors from a Fiori app hosted on our on premise gateway system. The SuccessFactors API is protected using Oauth2, and today we have an odata service on our GW system that authenticates the currently logged on user and returns a valid JWT token, that the Fiori app can then use to call SF Odata Services.

This works fine in custom applications, where we have control over the services and can add the JWT to our SF Services. 

Is there a way to do the same in Fiori Elements, can I somewhere call our "authentication service" and add the JWT to the mainService?
#

entry.title: Re: BTP CI-Filter condtion set up on oDATA API ( API_SALE...
entry.content: @satsunros it would look something like this, but you would have to figure out how to determine your starting date because I don't know what bounds you are trying to use. The following expression would give all orders between the beginning of the year and today - $filter=CreatedByUser eq 'RFC_BTP_DEV' and (CreationDate ge datetime'2024-01-01T:00:00:00' and CreationDate le datetime'${date:now:yyyy-MM-dd}T00:00:00')

entry.title: Assign IM mouvement to WM - Check table T156SY: entry XXX does not exist
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
For context:
I'm working on an ECC6 environment.
I'm trying to create a WM movement and then link it to a MM movement.
This movement will be called with the BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE.
So I've created the movement in SPRO. I then linked the movement through the SM30 on view V_156SC_VC as I needed to add a line and couldn't find any other solution.

My problem:
When calling the BAPI, the following error comes up “Check table T156SY: entry 311 X X Q B _ P does not exist” and indeed the table row doesn't exist and I can't find a way to fill it. Either via SPRO or SM30.

Do you know how to do this?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: How to embedd a mashup (HTML , no port binding) with auto sizing
entry.content:
Hi everybody,

I created a mashup for a SAC report and added this one to a custom work center (HTML, no port binding, full wide, height 100%). This works fine in general. The issue I ´m faced with is, that I need scroll bars up-down, left to right to display the content. If I change the zoom in C4C from 100% to 90% it looks perfectly good, but the normal user has as standard 100% zoom. How could I effect, that whatever zoom is set up in CRM my mashup display is always fullscreen in the window with no scroll bars.

 

Could someone advise?

KR Feli

entry.title: Re: Assign IM mouvement to WM - Check table T156SY: entry...
entry.content:
Did you try SM30 on view V_T156SY (or a small abap report) 

  • mainenance views V_156SC_VC, V_T156SY and V_156X_VC can be relevant to your requirement,
    BUT
  • ⚠️ NB: this is a 'system table, edited only by SAP, change = modification' ⚠️ So basically you shouldn't perform modifications that require to change this table

entry.title: Re: PO Archiving

Hello Karan,

Adding my colleague's answer, below I send the documentation links where you can check the entire Data Management in Sourcing and Procurement process: 

Data Archiving in Sourcing and Procurement in SAP Help Portal.

Kind regards!

entry.title: Re: How can we edit IO_TECH_REQUEST_CONTEXT in the GET_EXPANDED_ENTITY Method of Odata
entry.content:
Hello,
You can change the IO_TECH_REQUEST_CONTEXT using the method /IWBEP/IF_MGW_CORE_SRV_RUNTIME~READ_ENTITYSET

in my case it was necessary to stop using a search field coming from a fiori app.

 METHOD /iwbep/if_mgw_core_srv_runtime~read_entityset.
    
    DATA(ls_request_details) = is_request_details. """"SAME THAN IO_TECH_REQUEST_CONTEXT
    IF iv_entity_name  = 'APAROpenItem' AND iv_source_name =  'APAROpenItem'.
      IF line_exists( ls_request_details-parameters[ name = 'search' ] ).
          ls_request_details-parameters[ name = 'search' ]-value = ''.
      ENDIF.
    ENDIF.

    TRY.
        CALL METHOD super->/iwbep/if_mgw_core_srv_runtime~read_entityset
          EXPORTING
            iv_entity_name               = iv_entity_name
            iv_source_name               = iv_source_name
            is_paging                    = is_paging
            it_order                     = it_order
            it_filter_select_options     = it_filter_select_options
            is_request_details           = ls_request_details
            iv_do_return_provider_format = abap_false
          CHANGING
            cv_response_body             = cv_response_body
            ct_headers                   = ct_headers
            cr_entityset                 = cr_entityset
            cr_deleted_entityset         = cr_deleted_entityset
            cs_response_context          = cs_response_context
            ct_inline_info               = ct_inline_info.
      CATCH /iwbep/cx_mgw_busi_exception.
      CATCH /iwbep/cx_mgw_tech_exception.
    ENDTRY.
  ENDMETHOD.

entry.title: All requests must be either retrieve entity or retrieve entity set requests
entry.content:
Hi Experts 
I am using SAP BTP SDK for Android V5.1.2

I am getting issue while refreshing the offline store by calling below method.

offlineODataProvider.download()

Here I am getting the below error.

[-10340] The download failed due to an error on the server: -857 (SERVER_SYNCHRONIZATION_ERROR) ([-10225] Message: User exception: [-100022] An error occurred while determining the entity set for request "https://------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------?$filter=(CreatedOn%20ge%20datetime'2024-03-13T00:00:00'%20and%20CreatedOn%20le%20datetime'2024-06-11T00:00:00')&$expand=MaintOrderToComponents". All requests must be either retrieve entity or retrieve entity set requests.
Error caused by: [-100002] Entity set, ------------------------------------------------).

I got stuck here. Can any one of you please help me.

entry.content:
Hello,
Great instructions, my submission:

entry.title: Re: restrict users from changing the production order quantity
entry.content:
Hello

You need to implement a custom logic to check for the quantity and trigger an error message in case of changes.

If you are using the latest releases of SAP S/4HANA, you can use the Fiori App Custom Logic and create an implementation of BAdI BD_COBADICFL_MFGORDER_HDR, which is clean core compliant. 
In older releases, you can use BAdI WORKORDER_UPDATE.

Regards,
Caetano

entry.title: Re: IFRS 16 Leasing & Lease Liability Reclassification (IAS 1)
entry.content:
Hello Atif,

Amazing post. Thank you very much.

I have one question. At my implementation we have encountered this issue with Short Term and Long Term. Since the value of Short Term looks to match the depreciated value of the asset until a specific date. Do you think it would if we use the depreciation document to get the info of the short and long term?

In your example: Picture 13-2 shows that Short Term is the difference between start of contract and end of fiscal year balance (114.439,67 AED). At the end of the fiscal year this is the amount expected to be depreciated as well in the asset. Picture 14-2 shows that the reclassification report considered 114.439,67 AED. 

Thank you,

Nuno Anjos

entry.title: Re: User defined fields not displayed on Routings-Operati...
entry.content:
Hello

As soon as you assign user-specific field key into the routing operation, you should see the respective fields in the operation details screen.

Check the screenshot below for details:

Regards,
Caetano

entry.title: Batch Query Duplicate records
entry.content:
Hi All

Please help correct my Batch query below with Duplicate records.

SELECT
T0."DocEntry" AS "GRN DocEntry",
T0."DocNum" AS "GRN Number",
T0."DocDate" AS "Document Date",
T0."DocCur" AS "Currency",
T1."LineNum" AS "Line Number",
T1."ItemCode" AS "Item Code",
T3."ItemName" AS "Item Name",
T1."Quantity" AS "Quantity Received",
T1."Price" AS "Price",
T2."DistNumber" AS "Batch Number",
LEFT(T2."DistNumber", 6) AS "Manufacturing Date",
T2."ExpDate" AS "Expiry Date",
T1."WhsCode" AS "Warehouse Code",
T4."Quantity" AS "Available Quantity"
FROM
OIGN T0
INNER JOIN
IGN1 T1 ON T0."DocEntry" = T1."DocEntry"
LEFT JOIN
OBTN T2 ON T1."ItemCode" = T2."ItemCode"
LEFT JOIN
OITM T3 ON T1."ItemCode" = T3."ItemCode"
LEFT JOIN
OIBT T4 ON T1."ItemCode" = T4."ItemCode" AND T2."DistNumber" = T4."BatchNum" AND T1."WhsCode" = T4."WhsCode"
WHERE
T0."DocDate" >= '[%0]' AND T0."DocDate" <= '[%1]'

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: Re: Stuck in userlane tutorial. Can I skip the step?

Best regards,

entry.title: Re: BTP CI-Filter condtion set up on oDATA API ( API_SALE...
entry.content:
Hello Ryan, Thank you your suggestion. I think I have solution now instead of after read all your inputs
I simplly go with this filter and get all the records the date given in the filter. so this works and solution also for me. 
$filter=(CreatedByUser eq 'RFC_BTP_DEV' and (CreationDate ge datetime'2024-06-10T00:00:00'))

One last thing which I want to address to you about other issue in the same filter conditions, usually I must use the filter like below ( CreatedByUser not equals to RFC_BTP_DEV).

when I given 'ne' in filter condition I get HTTP 500 Internal server , could you please also give me your hint on this topic. it really saves my time

$filter=(CreatedByUser ne 'RFC_BTP_DEV' and (CreationDate ge datetime'2024-06-10T00:00:00'))

entry.title: Is there an Fiori app for good receipt free of charge?
entry.content:
Hello gurus' SAP

I need your help. I need a Fiori app that receives the materials free of charge (movement 511).

I don't have purchase order, I just have the number material and quantity to do that. I just receipt the materials, I don't need to validated any other data.

Is there a Fiori app for this goal?

Best regards,

Victor Carmona.

entry.title: Re: Provision users based on group membership
entry.content:
Hello!
Just to add to this, the "ias.api.version" property in the source system changes the payload. So if you are using "ias.api.version = 2", the rule would look like:

"condition": "$.groups[?(@.display IN [%provisioning.groups.array%])] EMPTY false",

Please note that it changes from "@.display" instead of "@.value".
After that this works without an issue. Hope this helps someone who finds this post in the future.

Best regards,
Rafael

entry.title: Re: Stuck in userlane tutorial. Can I skip the step?

Hi @Fausto1
In this case the blog Master the SAP Build Lobby (in 3 minutes) posted in our Technology Blogs by SAP might be helpful.

 

I will also trigger to move your question to the Technology Q&A board. This is the perfect place for this inquiry: From SAP BTP and ABAP Cloud to SAP NetWeaver and SAP BW - Q&A has you covered with answers to your questions about new technology and legacy systems. 

Our SAP Learning Group shall be used to get answers to questions about our learning journeys, certification preparation, and to reach learning goals.
Kind regards
Margit

entry.content: Thank you

entry.title: Assign multiple Sales Employee to a Business Partner, Sales Order, AR Invoice, etc.?
entry.content:
Hello.

I have SAP B1 V10 SQL.

We have almost a hundred sales people with some Client Business Partners being assigned multiple Sales Employees.  These sales employees receive commissions.  We also have some employees who are 'servicing' the site but do not receive commissions.

My question(s):

  1. is there any way to tag multiple (2, 3, 4, or even 5) sales person to a BP, SO, AR Invoice, etc.?  (for commissions purposes)
  2. is there any way to duplicate that Sales Employee box (and its multiple tagging ability) and label the new box "Servicing Employee".  This way we can identify who is/are responsible for servicing the site but do not receive commissions.  (there is also a 'Technicians' field, but that is limited to one value, and does not directly draw off of the same list as Sales Employee)

I've seen other postings on this forum suggesting creating a second commissions box to handle two sales employees who receive commissions. But this solution would not work for us for the reasons below:

  • Each box is still limited to one value/Sales Employee & we could have up to five sales employees. per business partner.
  • If we had the two box types (multiple boxes for each of sales employees + service employees), it would be significantly more complex.
  • searching in SAP would be too cumbersome if there were too many boxes to search

So, that's my challenge and I'm hoping some experts can help.

entry.title: LLM providers data residency for compute
entry.content:
I'm requested by my security department to check where data are processed when using SAP Generative AI Hub.
Let's suppose my AI Core instance is localized in AWS EU Frankfurt region. When I'm sending a prompt to an LMM model like gpt-35-turbo from azure openai, does the data is processed out the AWS EU Frankfurt region by the LLM provider ? Is there any SAP documentation that is describing physical data flow and guaranty, at least, that the data is not processed out of Europe ?

entry.title: Re: insufficient privilege currency conversion to shared...
entry.content:
Ok, then you must share the Currency Conversion Views (SAP.CURRENCY.VIEW.TCURV, ... TCURX,etc) used in the Currency Conversion function with the consumer space.

This is share the views from PROPAGATION to REPORTING.

Regards,

entry.title: Two tools and a structured process to move to the cloud from OP HCM
entry.content:
Considering the shift from on premise-based HCM to SAP SuccessFactors? Let's talk #ROI.

SAP has developed a powerful tool to aid your decision - the SAP HCM ROI Calculator! Based on the Enterprise Strategy Group (ESG) study titled "Analyzing the Economic Benefits of Moving from SAP ERP HCM to SAP SuccessFactors", this calculator is free, effortless and is designed to generate a quick estimate of your potential returns. The study shows that organizations usually experience an impressive 107% return on investment when transitioning. With only 4 critical data points needed to start, this tool can simplify your ROI assessment and get a more in depth analysis instigated.

And, of course, there's more! when you wish to delve deeper into your analysis, this intuitive calculator allows over 20 additional data points for user input, permitting a more personalized and accurate estimate of potential financial rewards. It significantly aids in breaking down the potential savings of making the switch to SAP SuccessFactors.

Get your hands on this calculator today and empower yourself to make an educated decision about your HCM system! From the initiation phase to making the leap, you can leverage the insights provided by the SAP SuccessFactors ROI tool 

Our Customer facing teams have access to a resource call the "Value Advisor" who can come into a customer organization to do an even deep, value based assessment to prove out for a customer both the ROI and the value of the move to the cloud. These assessments focus beyond just financial benefits. It looks at the suite of capabilities to effectively navigate the dynamic workforce requirements. From employee management to insightful analytics.

Don't forget that there is a process that wraps up all data you collect automatically here and in the Readiness Check Tool into an end to end flow for the customer. Here is a link to a blog from Steve Schnoll about the Customer Evolution Kit for HCM and the Readiness Check Tool at SAP.com

To sum up, the SAP HCM ROI Calculator is a critical analysis tool for organizations that are exploring SAP SuccessFactors. Its user-friendly interface and the potential of delivering a whopping 107% ROI make it a crucial asset in estimating the financial merits of moving. Take the first step towards experiencing these benefits first-hand and try the calculator today! Explore how it can favorably influence your organization's progress.

entry.title: Re: Dynamic parallel processing in SAP S/4HANA flexible w...
entry.content:
Actually the task container I get from io_context has 2 instances for 2 approvers selected at flexible workflow. These instances are private and can't access them, also the workitem id seems not committed to DB yet (checked in table SWWWIHEAD when debugging the callback method). )

Please check below screenshots from debugging:

I am not sure how to access the multiline parameter container MT_PARAMETER_CONTAINER. It is a private attribute of a local class of CL_SWF_FLEX_ENGINE. 

Best regards,

Sumit

entry.title: Re: Migrate your On-Premise SAP BPM applications to SAP Build Process Automation - Part 2
entry.content:
First of all thank you Venugopal this is the most clear information I have found regarding Netweaver BRM.

Yet still I have many questions, for instance, this part of this article table:
'Functional Mapping between On-Premise and Cloud Solutions'

This is regarding new platform supported capabilities, yet big questions arise:

1. Still not full support for NetWeaver BRM Business Rules Manager capabilities?

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_NETWEAVER_750/e6f38f3c900e4b61863df9d6f47969d6/03a0e1724777497f82128b4d77d516c4.html?version=7.5.26

2. Then still no full 'easily' 'automation' export import capabilities into SAP Build Process Automation, SAP Business Application Studio (BAS) ?

Thanks!

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation Monitor subpages keep loading
entry.content:
Hello,

Following up this post: SAP Build Process Automation Monitor subpages keep loading (content can't be reached), I have same issue. Sub-pages are not loading.

Especially:

  • Control Tower > Agents
  • Control Tower > Agent Groups...
  • or Control Tower > Environments > [My env] > Agent Management

The old post seems to affect an old version, I'm in the latest version.

I'm following the IA enablement training:

  • Intelligent Automation Enablement (in Success Map)
  • https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/spa-setup-desktop-agent.html 

So I'm not really familiar with it.

I have tried all the suggested workaround: incognito window, checking.enabling cookies, log in/log out...

I also tried to log in from SAP BTP cockpit via "Instances and Subscriptions".

Does anyone have any other advise/suggestions?

Thanks,

Yves

Thank you for this opportunity and good luck to everyone with their endeavors.

I would like to be included in this initiative as it would strengthen my CV for further job searches.

Thank you for this offer.

entry.title: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022: My Experience
entry.content:
As many of you may have heard, the ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 is now available on Docker. Consequently, the ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 1909 from Docker will be withdrawn. Check out Julie Plummer's blog post for all the details about what’s included, highlights of the release, and additional reading about ABAP Cloud and extensibility: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now | Blog Post 

In this blog post, I want to share my personal experiences installing the new ABAP developer edition on my MacBook with an Intel processor, especially since the older version is set to disappear from Docker. On the newest MacOS version, you can no longer run ABAP Cloud Developer Trial on Docker Desktop for MacBooks with an M-series processor. Thankfully, my MacBook with its Intel processor meant I dodged the compatibility issues—no need for workarounds or additional setups. If you are working with an M-series processor, I recommend checking out this blog post from our community member @dylan-drummond, who has written an exhaustive guide.

 

The ABAP Cloud Developer Trial is a free, downloadable ABAP Platform on SAP HANA 2.0 for trying out the ABAP language and toolset. It comes pre-configured with SAP Fiori launchpad, SAP Cloud Connector, backend/frontend connections, roles, and sample applications. This is the new name for ABAP Platform Trial, highlighting that you can now develop in the new ABAP Language Version, ABAP for Cloud Development.

 

Docker Desktop for MacBook

Understanding Docker container technology fundamentals is crucial, as the trial runs on a Docker platform. I suggest starting with the Setup Instructions available on the Docker Hub page: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022. This contains a lot of useful information needed to set up the container. This will save you time and help avoid the mistake I made by skimming through briefly. 

 When you open Docker Desktop for the first time, you need to accept the Docker Subscription Service Agreement. If you are using Docker Desktop for work purposes, you need to discuss with your employer whether you need a paid subscription.

 In the settings screen, I recommend adjusting the resources settings. Make sure you have assigned enough disk space to your Docker setup. The image is around 50GB when compressed. It would be frustrating to spend time downloading the image only to find out Docker does not have enough disk space to unpack it.

-  CPU limit: 6 

-  Memory limit: 28 GB (you might get away with less)

- Swap limit: 2 GB

- Virtual disk limit:  248 GB 

You can probably get by with a slightly smaller disk size, but the image takes up over 50GB on disk.


Installation Tips

One major tip during installation is to read the entire section of the documentation first. Don’t just cut and paste the command from the documentation without understanding them.

There are two ways to do this: using the command line (Docker Engine, which you installed as part of Docker Desktop setup) or using the GUI app (Docker Desktop, which in the background uses Docker Engine).  The GUI app method is to search in the top bar of Docker Desktop for the image, then press Pull. The command line method is:

 

 

 

sudo docker pull sapse/abap-cloud-developer-trial

 

 

 

The pull operation will take some time because there is over 20 GB of data to download, extract, and write to the local image repo of the Docker. Be patient. If the process fails, start it again (either from the GUI app or command line). Eventually, the image will be viewable in Docker Desktop’s Images tab and via the command.

 

Next, start up the a4h container. I’ll suggest doing this from the command line to specify all the options we want and immediately follow the command’s progress. Ensure Docker Desktop is running. The command is:

 

 

 

sudo docker run --stop-timeout 3600 -it --name a4h -h vhcala4hci -p 3200:3200 -p 3300:3300 -p 3601:3601 -p 8443:8443 -p 30213:30213 -p 50000:50000 -p 50001:50001 sapse/abap-cloud-developer-trial:ABAPTRIAL_2022 -skip-limits-check -agree-to-sap-license

 

 

 

Anyone running on Mac or Windows needs to add the "-skip-limits-check" to the run command. You also probably want to add the "agree-to-sap-license" switch to the run command to avoid having to start the container in interactive mode to accept the agreement.You can follow the Terminal window output and the progress in Docker Desktop.

You will now be able to set up the SAP GUI connection. The ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 has a new password: ABAPtr2022#00. The username is DEVELOPER and the client is either 001 for development or 000 for admin tasks. 



 

The system should be up and running, and you can see it is also visible in Eclipse

 

Wrapping Up

Overall, installing and using the ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 on Docker was quite easy. The new version is packed with features and pre-configured tools, making it easy to dive into ABAP development. Intel MacBook users will find the process straightforward, while those with M-series processors might need some extra steps for compatibility. 

All that I've detailed here is additional background and exploration information for those who want to learn more. The most important thing is just to get started! 

For a deeper dive into the specifics, including the features and release highlights, check out Julie Plummer’s blog post. This post also provides links to further information on ABAP Cloud and its extensibility.

If you need advice on any of the steps I mentioned, like logging into the SAP System or getting an A4H license, refer to the official advice from SAP on the ABAP Cloud Developer trial site

entry.title: Customer uses Bottles to store liquid. they want to label as HUs and have guided putaway to the HU.
entry.content:
Customer uses Bottles to store liquid. they want to label the Bottles as HUs and have guided putaway to the HU and assign the HU to fixed location. 

Is this possible? 

Essentially it is mobile bin. What is best practice here.

My first thought here is to used Fixed storage and Lable the Bottle as the BIN with Barcode. The down side to this if the Bottle is moved then there is no traceability to where it in the warehouse. 

This is in EWM

entry.title: Re: ODN number range should be continues for both domesti...

entry.content: Facing issue in Step-11

entry.title: What is the future for SAP Crystal Reports Server 2020?
entry.content:
We are a heavy user of Crystal Reports Server 2016 and Crystal Reports Server 2020.  Lately, we have been considering upgrading our remaining Crystal Reports Server 2016 instances to Crystal Reports Server 2020, based on the 2024 EOL dates for Crystal Reports Server 2020.  However, the EOL dates for Crystal Reports Server 2020 only get us a few more years.  Does SAP plan a new release of Crystal Reports Server, or is this the end of the roadmap for this product?

Thank you in advance for your time in answering this question.

entry.title: Can we set CFL fields to display only in standard fiori app ?
entry.content: Hi All, we have few custom fields added in Manage Billing Document. Is there a way we can set these field to display only when user is editing other standard field?

entry.title: Local codelist lookups in MAGs
entry.content:
Hello All,

I am doing a mapping in MAG and I have got a requirement to perform local codelist lookup by writing the logic in XSLT. I have created the required codelist in source MIG and assigned to the leaf nodes. Just wanted to know if there is any function available in XSLT that can be used to write codelist lookup logic?

If available please share a sample code snippet of the same.

Hi All

QQ, On the Preparatory Activity and Migration of Customizing for Credit Management -- Define Settings for Credit Management Migration we have just one Rule for migration, what happened if we have more than 1 rule? how can we migrate customers to BP Credit role with correct rules if we can only select one on the prep steps.

entry.title: Re: Cloud Integration – Sending email from Microsoft 365 to SAP Backend in private network using SA
entry.content:
Hello!

We are trying to get e-mails from a customer service e-mail box (outlook 365) into SAP S/4 Customer Management. The idea was to use ERMS with SAP Connect. Is it possible? or now we need to use CPI + BTP cloud connector? And, in this case, is the ERMS no longer needed? We need the original email sender to identify the business partner and generate a service request routed to a particular service group.

Thanks and regards!

Marisa

entry.title: Re: QM10/QM11/QM12 No filter can be set after upgrade on...
entry.content: Is this specific to these transactions or in all ALV lists?

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022: My Experience
entry.content:
Nice blog @Mamikee 👍

I suppose Intel MacBooks will still be around for quite a few years - for example I will keep running my old one until Apple stops releasing security patches for it, so it's worthwhile having a blog like yours which is easier to follow than the official advice.

For Intel MacBook users who want to try a different container management toolset (Podman Desktop), or who like to run Linux VMs as the base for the Cloud Developer Trial, then there is also a blog I wrote for Intel MacBooks that covers those two cases: https://community.sap.com/t5/devops-and-system-administration-blogs/using-podman-for-abap-platform-trial-container-on-ubuntu-server-and-on/ba-p/13573945 

(Well, my blogs were written for Abap Platform Trial, which is the predecessor of Cloud Developer Trial, but people can easily enough switch the commands to suit).

entry.title: Re: Cloud Integration: Manually Sign / Verify XML payload based on XML Signature Standard
entry.content: Tried it and loved it 😊

entry.title: Re: Is there any way to track or audit changes on who had...
entry.content:
What do you mean by "deleted the form"? Do you mean who withdrew or cancelled it? That information is stored in the "processes" table (name escapes me at the moment).....which has the status of all processes (even "withdrawn" as well as the ID of the person, date, and time of "change".

But curious of the need to audit this as it is pretty much auditing something that was never done....ie, a process that was never completed.

entry.title: Re: Assign Fiori processes to the user HCMFAB_STARTPROCES...
entry.content:
You must make sure that.....

1. you have the "user parameter" assigned to your user id which tells it which "browser context(s)" (and possible "process group(s)") are assigned to you as the processes shown depend on "browser context" assigned.

2. make sure your processes are assigned to an initiator role (which is directly associated as well to the "browser contect"). For example, HRASRA, HRASRB, HRASRD, etc.

3. make sure your "browser context" config was completed....there is a particular "view" for this you can maintain, but keep in mind, it is client dependent.

Thats just off the top of my head of things to check first.

entry.title: What is the future for SAP Crystal Reports Server 2020?
entry.content:
The future for SAP Crystal Reports Server 2020 is uncertain. SAP has announced that Crystal Reports for Enterprise will be discontinued after SAP BusinessObjects BI 2024, which means that support for Crystal Reports will also be phased out. This change is part of the broader strategy to move away from Crystal Reports and towards newer technologie. In the short term, SAP will continue to support Crystal Reports with the next version of BusinessObjects BI 2025, which will include connectivity to .unx universes starting with 4.3 SP . However, beyond 2027, the future of Crystal Reports is unclear, as SAP has not provided a detailed roadmap for the product beyond that date. In summary, while SAP will continue to support Crystal Reports for the next few years, the long-term future of the product is uncertain and may involve a transition to newer technologies.

SAP Universal ID HCM (Human Capital Management)

entry.title: Re: SAP MaxDB Content Server Migration with Minimized Downtime for Large Size DB
entry.content: Is the last log backup really necessary? Or would it be enough to use one last incremental backup of the MaxDB created during the planned downtime?

entry.title: Re: Subscription Failed: SAP CAP Multitenant application.
entry.content:
Hi @jreimann,

{
    "name": "vendortracker",
    "version": "1.0.0",
    "description": "A simple CAP project.",
    "type": "commonjs",
    "repository": "<Add your repository here>",
    "license": "UNLICENSED",
    "private": true,
    "dependencies": {
        "@sap-cloud-sdk/connectivity": "^3.9.0",
        "@sap-cloud-sdk/core": "^1.54.2",
        "@sap-cloud-sdk/http-client": "^3.5.0",
        "@sap-cloud-sdk/mail-client": "^3.9.0",
        "@sap-cloud-sdk/resilience": "^3.4.0",
        "@sap/approuter": "^16.2.1",
        "@sap/cds": "^7",
        "@sap/cds-hana": "^2",
        "@sap/hdi-deploy": "^4.8.0",
        "@sap/xssec": "^3.6.0",
        "axios": "^1.4.0",
        "cors": "^2.8.5",
        "express": "^4.18.2",
        "form-data": "^4.0.0",
        "hdb": "^0.19.6",
        "moment": "^2.29.4",
        "passport": "^0.6.0",
        "util": "^0.12.5",
        "uuid": "^9.0.1",
        "uuid-random": "^1.3.2"
    },
    "devDependencies": {
        "@cap-js/sqlite": "^1.2.1",
        "@sap/cds-dk": "^7.2.0",
        "@sap/ux-specification": "UI5-1.116",
        "@types/uuid": "^9.0.4",
        "@ui5/cli": "^3.9.2",
        "rimraf": "^3.0.2"
    },
    "scripts": {
        "start": "cds-serve",
        "watch-configapp": "cds watch --open configapp/webapp/index.html?sap-ui-xx-viewCache=false",
        "undeploy": "cf undeploy vendortracker --delete-services --delete-service-keys --delete-service-brokers",
        "build": "rimraf resources mta_archives && mbt build --mtar archive",
        "deploy": "cf deploy mta_archives/vendortracker_1.0.0.mtar --retries 1",
        "watch-certificateapp": "cds watch --open certificateapp/webapp/index.html?sap-ui-xx-viewCache=false",
        "watch-configurationapp": "cds watch --open configurationapp/webapp/index.html?sap-ui-xx-viewCache=false",
        "watch-project1": "cds watch --open project1/webapp/index.html?sap-ui-xx-viewCache=false"
    },
    "sapux": [
        "app/configurationapp",
        "app/project1"
    ],
    "cds": {
        "features": {
            "csrf": true,
            "csrfInBatch": true
        },
        "build": {
            "tasks": [
                {
                    "for": "hana",
                    "dest": "../db"
                },
                {
                    "for": "node-cf"
                }
            ]
        },
        "requires": {
            "db": {
                "kind": "hana",
                "credentials": {
                    "database": "vendortracker-hdivendortracker"
                }
            },
            "auth": "xsuaa",
            "mailService": {
                "kind": "rest",
                "credentials": {
                    "destination": "mail_destination",
                    "forwardAuthToken": true
                },
                "csrf": true
            }
          
        }
    }
}

entry.title: Re: Subscription Failed: SAP CAP Multitenant application.
entry.content:
vendortracker > app > xs.app.json

{
    "welcomeFile": "/app/index.html",
    "authenticationMethod": "route",
    "logout": {
        "logoutEndpoint": "/app-logout",
        "logoutPage": "/"
    },
    "routes": [
        {
            "source": "^/app/(.*)$",
            "target": "$1",
            "localDir": ".",
            "cacheControl": "no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate",
            "authenticationType": "xsuaa"
        },
        {
            "source": "^/appconfig/",
            "localDir": ".",
            "cacheControl": "no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate"
        },
        {
            "source": "^/user-api(.*)",
            "target": "$1",
            "service": "sap-approuter-userapi"
        },
        {
            "source": "^/sms-api/(.*)$",
            "target": "$1",
            "destination": "sms-api",
            "csrfProtection": false,
            "authenticationType": "none"
        },
        {
            "source": "^/(.*)$",
            "target": "$1",
            "destination": "srv-api",
            "csrfProtection": false,
            "authenticationType": "xsuaa"
        }
    ]
}

entry.title: Re: Subscription Failed: SAP CAP Multitenant application.
entry.content:
vendortracker > app > package.json

{
  "name": "approuter",
  "dependencies": {
    "@sap/approuter": "^14.0.0"
  },
  "engines": {
    "node": "^18.0.0"
  },
  "scripts": {
    "start": "node node_modules/@sap/approuter/approuter.js"
  }
}

entry.title: Change of email address or phoneNumber is triggering webhook without new email/phoneNumber
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have webhook configured for accountUpdated event. So, when we change email address after code verification it calls "account.otp.update" API. As mentioned in documentation, it triggers the accountUpdated event but the payload does not have changed email address or phone number.

Is there any way to add changed/new email/phoneNumber to payload?

Thanks

Rohit

entry.content:
Hi Vitality!

Here is my week 1 submission!

entry.title: Help Needed: Error with Call Transaction in BDC (ABAP Program CL_BUPA_RESULT_SUB_SCREEN_ALV=CP)
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm currently working on creating a Batch Data Communication (BDC) in SAP. However, I'm encountering a problem during debugging. Whenever the program executes the CALL TRANSACTION, it crashes and generates the following error dump:

Dump generated in ABAP Program CL_BUPA_RESULT_SUB_SCREEN_ALV=CP by a batch input to the T-code BP

Has anyone experienced a similar issue or have any insights into what might be causing this error? I've tried checking for typical issues like screen sequences and authorization problems, but nothing seems to stand out. Any help or pointers would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Submissions for "SAP HANA Cloud multi-model" developer challenge: Week 1 - Setup
entry.content:
Hi John. I see you pasted all the separate Python statements into a single IPython execution.

Was it on purpose? 🤓
